# Welcome, {{FIRST_NAME}}!

We're excited to have you with us today and kick off your journey as an *agentic* engineer!

To help you get started, we have already preconfigured for you. 
<details><summary>See what's included</summary>
&nbsp; ✔ Paid for by GitHub<br>
&nbsp; ✔ Access to GitHub Copilot<br>
&nbsp; ✔ Installed GitHub CLI<br>
&nbsp; ✔ Installed GitHub Agentic Workflows CLI</details>

**Please be patient** while your codespace is building the first time. Once it's ready, you must accept the prompt to allow the workshop guide to open:

<img src="images/open-my-guide.png" alt="Open my Guide" width="420" />

If you close the guide, you can also open it manually by following these steps:

1. Press <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+<kbd>Shift</kbd>+<kbd>P</kbd> (Windows/Linux) or <kbd>Cmd</kbd>+<kbd>Shift</kbd>+<kbd>P</kbd> (macOS) to open the Command Palette.
3. Type `Tasks: Run Task` and press <kbd>Enter</kbd>
4. Select `Open my Guide` and press <kbd>Enter</kbd>

**Click the button below** to get started:

[![Open my Codespace](https://github.com/codespaces/badge.svg)]({{CODESPACE_URL}})
